parameters.query: =SELECT c.id AS client_id, c.domain, c.name, array_agg(DISTINCT k.keyword) FILTER (WHERE k.is_tracked = true) AS keywords FROM clients c LEFT JOIN keywords k ON k.client_id = c.id WHERE c.id = '{{$json.body.client_id}}' GROUP BY c.id

=INSERT INTO backlink_prospects (client_id, domain, url, status, source, notes) VALUES ('{{$json.client_id}}', '{{$json.domain}}', '{{$json.url}}', 'new', 'n8n-prospector', 'Found via: {{$json.keyword}} | {{$json.title}}') ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

=INSERT INTO agent_action_log (client_id, module, action_type, summary, status, triggered_by, created_at) VALUES ('{{$json.client_id}}', 'backlinks', 'prospect_found', 'Backlink prospect found: {{$json.domain}} (via "{{$json.keyword}}")', 'success', 'n8n-backlink-prospector', NOW())
